data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of capturing close-won/close-lost reasons, which is a critical aspect of the sales process. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or data regarding the existence or functionality of this feature, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. The linked use case mentions the need for this capture, but no evidence supports its implementation or availability in the current state.
gaps: No evidence of close-won/close-lost reason capture.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for close-won/close-lost reason capture
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the implementation of close-won/close-lost reason capture.
